# Rootstory

> Narrative Intelligence Platform — turning first-person accounts into structured, analysable evidence.

Rootstory helps governments, foundations, and organisations listen at scale. We capture micro narratives through adaptive AI-guided interviews in local languages, then structure and validate them so lived experience becomes rigorous evidence.

## What We Do

- **Listen at Scale** — AI-guided conversations in local languages capture structured, first-person accounts from thousands of participants simultaneously.
- **Structure the Story** — Every narrative is tagged, validated, and structured by trained analysts, grounding testimony in lived reality.
- **Analyse Alongside Data** — Rootstory datasets integrate with quantitative research so policymakers can see not just what changed, but how change moved through households and communities.

## Who We Serve

Governments, development finance institutions, foundations, and research organisations seeking qualitative evidence that complements quantitative data.

## Core Values

Micro narratives · Grassroot lens · Core values

## Pages

- `/` — Home (Hero, What We Do, How It Works, Who We Serve, Evidence, CTA)
- `/blog` — Blog (long-form editorial, methodology, and origin stories)
